basic_details.job_title: Nainital Bank Advisor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Nainital Bank Advisor-HR Notification 2026 has been released on 01-07-2026 on the official website nainitalbank.co.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Nainital Bank Advisor-HR Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 50 years Maximum Age: 65 years

qualification.education_qualification: Superannuated/ Retired/VRS Optee /Resigned in Grade/Scale of AGM and above or equivalent position who have worked in any Public Sector/ Private Sector Bank and experience in Human Resource & IR, Handling Disciplinary Proceedings, Vigilance cases etc.
qualification.details: Superannuated/ Retired/VRS Optee /Resigned in Grade/Scale of AGM and above or equivalent position, who have worked in any Public Sector/ Private Sector Bank and experience in Human Resource & IR, Handling Disciplinary Proceedings, Vigilance cases etc.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Nainital Bank Advisor-HR Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Nainital Bank Advisor-HR Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Nainital Bank Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Nainital Bank Advisor-HR Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Superannuated/ Retired/VRS Optee /Resigned in Grade/Scale of AGM and above or equivalent position, who have worked in any Public Sector/ Private Sector Bank and experience in Human Resource & IR, Handling Disciplinary Proceedings, Vigilance cases etc.

content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 50 years Maximum Age: 65 years

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Nainital Bank Advisor-HR Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Nainital Bank Advisor-HR Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Nainital Bank Advisor-HR recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Nainital Bank Advisor-HR recruitment is 20th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Advisor-HR post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Advisor-HR post at Nainital Bank.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Advisor-HR position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Advisor-HR position is between 50 to 65 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Advisor-HR role?
faq.answer: The salary for the Advisor-HR role ranges from Rs. 100,000 to Rs. 1,200,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for this recruitment is offline.

faq.question: Q6. What are the essential qualifications for the Advisor-HR post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be retired officials from AGM or equivalent grade with experience in HR, IR, disciplinary proceedings, and vigilance cases.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Advisor-HR recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves screening, shortlisting, and a personal interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for this position is contract-based.

faq.question: Q10. In which state and city is this job located?
faq.answer: This job is located in Nainital, Uttarakhand.
